# Motion & Transitions

## Duration Scale

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--duration-fast` | `150ms` | Micro-interactions (hover, focus) |
| `--duration-normal` | `200ms` | Standard transitions (color, opacity) |
| `--duration-slow` | `300ms` | Larger transitions (expand/collapse) |
| `--duration-slower` | `500ms` | Complex animations (page transitions) |
| `--duration-spin` | `800ms` | Spinner rotation cycle |
| `--duration-shimmer` | `1.5s` | Skeleton loading shimmer |
| `--duration-progress` | `2s` | Progress bar animation |

## Transition Presets

Combines duration and easing into a single token for use with the CSS `transition` property.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--transition-fast` | `150ms ease-out` | Hover/focus state changes |
| `--transition-normal` | `200ms ease-in-out` | General property transitions |
| `--transition-slow` | `300ms ease-in-out` | Expand/collapse, slide |
| `--transition-slower` | `500ms ease-in-out` | Large layout shifts |
| `--transition-progress` | `500ms ease-out` | Progress bar width changes |

## Easing Curves

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--ease-out` | `cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)` | Entering elements (fast start, gentle stop) |
| `--ease-in-out` | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` | General-purpose easing |
| `--ease-vaul` | `cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1)` | Drawer/sheet animations (Vaul-style spring) |

## Opacity Scale

Opacity tokens are Layer 2 non-themed aliases defined in `tokens.css` (not `theme.css`) because they are identical in light and dark modes.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--opacity-disabled` | `0.5` | Disabled controls |
| `--opacity-muted` | `0.6` | Muted/de-emphasized elements |
| `--opacity-active` | `0.7` | Active/pressed state |
| `--opacity-hover` | `0.8` | Hover state |
| `--opacity-subtle` | `0.9` | Slightly faded |

## View Transitions

The add-set form uses the native View Transitions API to animate between multi-step form pages. Transition groups are assigned via `view-transition-name` in component CSS. Direction is controlled by a `data-vt-direction` attribute on the `<html>` element (`"forward"` or `"back"`).

### Transition Groups

| Group | Duration | Easing | Behavior |
|-------|----------|--------|----------|
| `add-set-modal` | `0ms` | — | No animation (persistent chrome) |
| `add-set-header` | `200ms` | `ease-out` | Morphs header content changes |
| `add-set-actions` | `200ms` | `ease-out` | Morphs footer button text |
| `add-set-image` | `300ms` (forward), `250ms` (back) | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` | Morphs image between preview and compact |
| `add-set-name` | `300ms` (forward), `250ms` (back) | `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)` | Morphs set name position |
| `add-set-content` | Sequenced crossfade | `ease-out` | Step content area |

### Content Crossfade Timing

| Direction | Old (fade out) | New (fade in) |
|-----------|----------------|---------------|
| Forward | `120ms ease-out` | `180ms ease-out`, `200ms` delay |
| Back | `100ms ease-out` | `150ms ease-out`, `150ms` delay |

The delay on the incoming content ensures the morph animations settle before new content appears.

## Reduced Motion

All view transition animations are disabled when `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` is active. Durations and delays are set to `0ms` for all transition groups.

## Rules

- Always use `--duration-*` tokens for `animation-duration` and `transition-duration`.
- Always use `--transition-*` tokens for `transition` shorthand values.
- Always use `--ease-*` tokens for `animation-timing-function` and `transition-timing-function`.
- Always use `--opacity-*` tokens for opacity states.
- Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` — disable or minimize animations for users who request it.
- Never use raw millisecond or cubic-bezier values in component CSS.
